basic_details.job_title: Technology Development Board Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Technology Development Board has released an official notification for the recruitment of 5 Project Coordinator Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 17-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech / Ph.D with 05-10 years' work experience
qualification.details: M.Tech / Ph.D with 05-10 years' work experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Technology Development Board Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.tdb.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.technology_development_board: M.Tech / Ph.D with 05-10 years' work experience

content_sections.heading: Technology Development Board Project Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Technology Development Board Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Technology Development Board Project Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Technology Development Board Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.tdb.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Technology Development Board Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Coordinator position is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech or Ph.D. degree along with 05 to 10 years of relevant work experience to be eligible for the Project Coordinator position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Coordinator post is 45 years as of 01 January 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Coordinator role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 90,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Project Coordinator position announced by the Technology Development Board.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Coordinator post will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Coordinator recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of the Technology Development Board?
faq.answer: The official website of the Technology Development Board is www.tdb.gov.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Project Coordinator recruitment is TDB-11017/6/2023-Admin.
